ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the team is based */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team is part of */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's assistant coach */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team's captain */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_banner" TEXT /* Banner image of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport associated with the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "league_format" TEXT /* Format of the league (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  "prize_pool" TEXT /* Prize pool for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time when the match was played */,
  "team1_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the first team */,
  "team2_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the second team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "penalty_wins" INTEGER /* Number of penalty shootout wins */,
  "penalty_losses" INTEGER /* Number of penalty shootout losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., stadium, arena) */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  "venue_description" TEXT /* Description of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total shots on target by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the referee */,
  "referee_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of refereeing experience */,
  "referee_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the referee (e.g., soccer, basketball) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "assistant_referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant referee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., referee, assistant referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_assistant_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)
